_comment: Committed seed corrections — the source-of-truth plan for taxonomy fields that have been human-verified. feedbackStore.ts loads this as a baseline; runtime overrides in .cache/feedback-corrections.json merge on top. Add corrections here when you want them to persist across environments and CI runs.

hclvhMBxnJbxq8OQQv7HN.title: Contentful Platform
hclvhMBxnJbxq8OQQv7HN.notes: Generic horizontal SaaS product page. Industry = Software/IT regardless of logo mentions (BMW/Target logos are proof points, not vertical signals). Topic = Headless CMS (core value prop). Buyers are Content and IT teams at Director level. Funnel = BOFU (Contact Sales CTA).

2t9rt3rGNWRzzjD860ZGcN.title: Contentful Studio
2t9rt3rGNWRzzjD860ZGcN.notes: Studio is the visual content editing product. Topic = Content operations (editorial workflow, visual editing). Buyers are Content teams. Industry = Software/IT. Funnel = BOFU.

4k1s2LLivgOmEoBW0oIYa2.title: Contentful AI Actions
4k1s2LLivgOmEoBW0oIYa2.notes: AI Actions is Contentful's AI automation product. Topic = Artificial intelligence (AI) unambiguously — not Personalization, even though the page mentions personalization workflows as a use case. Buyers are Content and IT teams. Funnel = BOFU.

157frRcpp3idwV1s1831V6.title: Contentful Ecosystem
157frRcpp3idwV1s1831V6.notes: Ecosystem page is about integrations and partner apps. Topic = Integrations. Buyers are IT/Engineering (developer integrations). Industry = Software/IT. Funnel = BOFU (Contact Sales CTA, not Consideration).

5yRQig0lpBHEYEvAFz54S8.title: Contentful Personalization
5yRQig0lpBHEYEvAFz54S8.notes: Personalization (Ninetailed) product page. Topic = Personalization (not Experimentation). Buyers are Marketing teams (personalization = marketing/growth function, not content). Industry = Software/IT. Funnel = BOFU.

3AUXJjWMUVyMT9oJRE5EZx.title: Contentful Analytics
3AUXJjWMUVyMT9oJRE5EZx.notes: Analytics product page. Topic = Analytics. Buyers are Marketing and Content teams tracking content performance. Industry = Software/IT. Funnel = BOFU.

36Nrw1F5VZ74VOIZgHEhMm.title: Contentful Front-end Hosting
36Nrw1F5VZ74VOIZgHEhMm.notes: Hosting/deployment capability page. Topic = Deployment (not Integrations). Buyers are Developers/Engineering (frontend deployment is a dev function). Industry = Software/IT. Funnel = BOFU.
